hero.textBlockLeft: Continuous learning and staying updated with the latest trends will be key to achieving these goals.
hero.textBlockRight: In the long term, I aspire to specialize in building innovative and popular applications for web, mobile, and potentially desktop platforms.

about.title: ABOUT ME
about.description1: Skilled Front-end Developer with 5 years of experience in developing and maintaining front-end web applications. Proficient in JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, ES6, React.js, and Next.js. Experienced in code testing and debugging.
about.yearsDescription: Building web experiences with modern technologies

collaborate.title: LET'S COLLABORATE
collaborate.description: Have an exciting project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Let's create something amazing together.
